profile.summary: Experienced palm farmer with 5 years of experience and an additional 1 year in banana harvesting. Skilled in cutting palm trees, extracting palm oil, and banana harvesting. Experienced in using a machete and carrying a bag during farm work. Also manages household responsibilities such as cooking and washing clothes. Completed primary school education with basic literacy skills. Speaks English and local language proficiently.

technical.name: Palm oil extraction
evidence: I mostly help cut palm trees and extract oil.

technical.name: Banana harvesting
evidence: I was working in banana harvesting for 1 year

tools.name: Machete
evidence: I have a machete to cut and also carry a bag.

evidence: I have a machete to cut and also carry a bag.

evidence.question: What kind of work would you like to do, and what practical tasks have you already done at work, school, home, in business, or in your community?
evidence.answer: I am a palm farmer. I mostly help cut palm trees and extract oil. In my family time I cook and im repsonsible to wash clothes

evidence.question: Do you currently have a job and if yes, can you tell me how many years of experience you have working in palm farming or related agricultural activities?
evidence.answer: No, I had 5 years of experience in palm farming and also I was working in banana harvesting for 1 year

evidence.question: What is the highest level of education or training you have completed, and do you have any certifications related to agriculture or farming?
evidence.answer: I finished primary school and can read and write.

evidence.question: Can you tell me about any tools or equipment you use in your palm farming or banana harvesting work?
evidence.answer: I have a machete to cut and also carry a bag.

evidence.question: Do you speak any languages other than your native language, and what is your proficiency in them?
evidence.answer: English yes, and also my local language write and talk
